title: 嗜睡蔷薇
synopsis: 民国三年（1914年）9月10日，浙江宁波四明山上的蔷薇馆。一场暴风雨即将来临，这座隐藏着炼金术秘密的古老别墅里，主人罗亨理被发现死在陈列室中。六名嫌疑人各有动机，而真相隐藏在嗜睡症、女巫传说和献祭仪式的迷雾之中。
styleGuide: 1914 Republican era Chinese mansion on mountain cliff, Western architecture, oil painting style, stormy atmosphere, dramatic lighting, mysterious shadows

cover.prompt: Vertical poster for a 1914 Chinese mansion murder mystery. A Western-style villa on a mountain cliff, storm clouds gathering, oil painting style, dramatic lighting, six silhouettes in period costumes, mysterious atmosphere
